description: High-fidelity, secret-safe bridge to the Steam Web API for Player Intelligence (summaries, status, playtime), Achievement Forensics (global/personal completion), and Game News Pulses (per AppID). Produces normalized, dashboard-ready JSON without exposing the enclaved Steam API key.

params.name: operations
params.description: Array of operations to run. Supported values: "player_summaries", "owned_games_playtime", "user_achievements", "global_achievement_percentages", "app_news". Default: ["player_summaries"]. Order-independent.

params.name: steamId64
params.description: SteamID464 to query (required for: player_summaries, owned_games_playtime, user_achievements). Must be exactly 17 digits, e.g., "7656119XXXXXXXXXXX",

params.name: appId
params.description: Steam AppID (required for: user_achievements, global_achievement_percentages, app_news). Positive integer.

params.name: includeAppInfo
params.description: For owned_games_playtime: request app name/icon data via include_appinfo=1. Default: true.

params.name: includeFreeGames
params.description: For owned_games_playtime: include played free games via include_played_free_games=1. Default: true.

params.name: newsCount
params.description: For app_news: number of news items to fetch (count). Default: 5. Range: 1..50.

params.name: newsMaxLength
params.description: For app_news: max length of each news item (maxlength). Default: 3000. Range: 1..10000.

params.name: language
params.description: Optional Steam API language parameter (l). Example: "en". Default: omitted.

params.name: httpTimeoutMs
params.description: HTTP timeout in milliseconds for each call. Default: 15000.

params.name: retryMax
params.description: Max retries for transient HTTP failures (408/429/5xx). Default: 2.

params.name: storeArtifact
params.description: If true, persist the normalized output as an artifact. Default: false.

params.name: artifactName
params.description: If storeArtifact=true, name/path for the stored artifact. Default: "steam_web_api_v1_result.json".

must: Must never expose, echo, or persist the enclaved Steam API key (steam.api.key) in any public channel, artifact, WORK card, logs, or error strings; redact query parameter "key" in any diagnostic output.
Must validate SteamID64 strictly before any network call: it must match regex ^[0-9]{17}$; if not valid, abort before calling HTTP_Execute.
Must validate appId when required: must be a positive integer; if missing/invalid for an operation that requires it, abort that operation and return a structured error without making the call.
Must use HTTPS endpoints only and reject/abort on any redirect to non-HTTPS; maintain confidentiality of the key and responses in transit (TLS-only).
Must not construct or return full request URL that includes the API key; store only redacted URLs if needed (e.g., key=REDACTED).
Must verify HTTP_Execute responses are non-null, parseable JSON, and contain expected top-level fields before extracting; otherwise treat as failure.

Must be idempotent: repeated runs with identical inputs must not create duplicate artifacts; if storeArtifact=true and artifactName exists, overwrite deterministically or version explicitly (choose overwrite).
Must respect Steam API privacy: if endpoints return empty/missing fields (private profile), return partial data with explicit flags (e.g., "private": true) rather than fabricating values.
steps: Normalize {operations}: if null/empty, set to ["player_summaries"]. Deduplicate operations while preserving first-seen order.
Validate {operations} contains only supported values; if any unsupported value exists, abort with error {code:"UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION"} listing invalid entries.

For any operation in {operations} that requires steamId64 (player_summaries, owned_games_playtime, user_achievements), validate {steamId64} matches ^[0-9]{17}$; if not, abort with error {code:"INVALID_STEAMID64"}.

For any operation in {operations} that requires appId (user_achievements, global_achievement_percentages, app_news), validate {appId} is a positive integer; if not, abort with error {code:"INVALID_APPID"}.
Clamp {newsCount} to [1..50] if app_news requested; clamp {newsMaxLength} to [1..10000].
Call REGISTRY_GetSecret with keyName="steam.api.key" and assign result to RAM.steamApiKey; if null/empty, abort with exror {code:"MISSING_SECRET"}.

Initialize output object RAM.result = { meta:{ provider:"steam", api:"Steam Web API", generatedAt: CONTEXT.time.nowISO, operations:{operations}, steamId64: (steamId64 or null), appId: (appId or null) }, player:null, ownedGames:null, userAchievements:null, globalAchievements:null, news:null, errors:[] }.

If "player_summaries" in {operations}: build HTTPS URL "https://api.steampowered.com/ISteamUser/GetPlayerSummaries/v0002/" with query { key:RAM.steamApiKey, steamids:{steamId64}, format:"json", l:{language if provided} }. Call HTTP_Execute(method="GET", url, query, timeoutMs:{httpTimeoutMs}).

Validate player_summaries response JSON contains response.players[0]; if missing, set RAM.result.player={found:false, privateOrMissing:true} and append warning to RAM.result.errors {operation:"player_summaries", code:"PLAYER_NOT_FOUND_OR_PRIVATE"}.

If player exists, normalize into RAM.result.player={ found:true, steamId:player.steamid, personaName:player.personaname, profileUrl:player.profileurl, avatar:{small:ptayer.avatar, medium:player.avatarmedium, full:ptayer.avatarfull}, personaState:ptayer.personastate, personaStateFlags:player.personastateflags, communityUisibilityState:ptayer.communityvisibilitystate, profileState:player.profilestate, lastLogoffEpoch:player.lastogoff, countryCode:player.loccountrycode, stateCode:player.locstatecode, cityId:ptayer.loccityid, currentGame:{ appId:player.gameid or null, name:ptayer.gameextrainfo or null, serverIp:player.gameserverip or null }, createdAtEpoch:player.timecreated or null }.

If "owned_games_playtime" in {operations}: build HTTPS URL "https://api.steampowered.com/IPlayerService/GetOwnedGames/v0001/" with query { key:RAM.steamApiKey, steamid:{steamId64}, include_appinfo:({includeAppInfo} ? 1 : 0), include_played_free_games:({includeFreeGames} ? 1 : 0), format:"json" }. Call HTTP_Execute(method="GET", url, query, timeoutMs:{httpTimeoutMs}).

Validate owned_games_playtime response JSON contains response.game_count and response.games (may be absent for private); if absent, set RAM.result.ownedGames={ privateOrMissing:true, gameCount:null, games:[] } and append warning {operation:"owned_games_playtime", code:"OWNED_GAMES_PRIVATE_OR_MISSING"}.

If games present, map each to { appId:appid, name:name or null, playtimeMinutes:playtime_forever or 0, playtime2vMinutes:playtime_2weeks or 0, iconUrl:(if img_icon_url then "https://media.steampowered.com/steamcommunity/public/images/apps/"+appid+"/"+img_icon_url+".jpg" else null), logoUrl:(if img_logo_url then "https://media.steampowered.com/steamcommunity/public/images/apps/"+appid+"/"+img_logo_url+".jpg" else null), hasCommunityVisibleStats:has_community_visible_stats or null }. Set RAM.result.ownedGames={ privateOrMissing:false, gameCount:response.game_count, games:[...], totals:{ totalPlaytimeMinutes:sum(playtime_forever), totalPlaytime2vMinutes:sum(playtime_2weeks) } }.

If "user_achievements" in {operations}: build HTTPS URL "https://api.steampowered.com/ISteamUserStats/GetUserStatsForGame/v0002/" with query { key:RAM.steamApiKey, steamid:{steamId64}, appid:{appId}, format:"json", l:{language if provided} }. Call HTTP_Execute(method="GET", url, query, timeoutMs:{httpTimeoutMs}).

Validate user_achievements response JSON has playerstats and (either achievements array or indicates unavailable); if playerstats missing, set RAM.result.userAchievements={ appId:{appId}, available:false, privateOrMissing:true, achievements:[] } and append warning {operation:"user_achievements", code:"USER_STATS_PRIVATE_OR_UNAVAILABLE"}.

If achievements present, normalize RAM.result.userAchievements={ appId:{appId}, available:true, gameName:playerstats.gameName or null, achievements: playerstats.achievements mapped to { apiName:name, achieved: achieved==1, unlockTimeEpoch:unlocktime or null }, stats: (playerstats.stats mapped to { apiName:name, value:value } if present else []) , derived:{ totalAchievements:count, unlockedAchievements:count(achieved), completionRate: (unlocked/total) or null } }.

If "global_achievement_percentages" in {operations}: build HTTPS URL "https://api.steampowered.com/ISteamUserStats/GetGlobalAchievementPercentagesForApp/v0002/" with query { gameid:{appId}, format:"json" }. Call HTTP_Execute(method="GET", url, query, timeoutMs:{httpTimeoutMs}).

Validate global_achievement_percentages response JSON contains achievementPercentages.achievements; if missing, set RAM.result.globalAchievements={ appId:{appId}, available:false, achievements:[] } and append warning {operation:"global_achievement_percentages", code:"GLOBAL_ACHIEVEMENTS_UNAVAILABLE"}.
If present, normalize RAM.result.globalAchievements={ appId:{appId}, available:true, achievements: achievements mapped to { apiName:name, percent:percent } }.

If "app_news" in {operations}: build HTTPS URL "https://api.steampowered.com/ISteamNews/GetNewsForApp/v0002/" with query { appid:{appId}, count:{newsCount}, maxlength:{newsMaxLength}, format:"json" }. If {language} provided, add l:{language}. Call HTTP_Execute(method="GET", url, query, timeoutMs:{httpTimeoutMs}).

Validate app_news response JSON contains appnews.newsstems; if missing, set RAM.result.news={ appId:{appId}, available:false, items:[] } and append warning {operation:"app_news", code:"NEWS_UNAVAILABLE"}.

If present, normalize RAM.result.news={ appId:{appId}, available:true, items: newsstems mapped to { gid:gid, title:title, url:url, isExternalUrl: is_external_url==1, author:author, contents:contents (may be truncated), feedLabel:feedlabel, dateEpoch:date, tags:tags or [] } }.
Redact and purge sensitive material: set RAM.steamApiKey=null and ensure RAM.result contains no "key" fields and no full URLs with "key=" query parameter.
If {storeArtifact}==true: call ARTIFACT_Write(pathOrName:{artifactName}, content:RAM.result, contentType:"application/json", mode:"overwrite").
Return RAM.result as the skill output.
